channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #85 - 2026-04-02
item.description:
🔥 Bambu Lab and Pop Mart Lawsuit Settled Out of Court - 3D Printing Industry Bambu Lab and Pop Mart Lawsuit Settled Out of Court 3D Printing Industry Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Mar 31, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxPb2hYcFhXS2xJSG0xU2RqSHpXaHYtaVFPckxIc2NDa2FTV2IyNGVzb2wwcVVhX21TS3hxbDZRZkZSSDlPcVBZdnByUHp1TmdSWWxtTVkyWmplSTljaWpiQnBJY3VOMDQ5bHBsXzh1eEVBZ1hpdko2RGRnUVV3Y2Y4aFlWQ0hlUDFJTmZUWGlzMEFQTm0wdEdDMndHNA?oc=5

♻️ From Scrap to Spool: Creality’s M1 and R1 Bring Filament Recycling to the Desktop Shenzhen-based 3D printer manufacturer Creality has introduced the Filament Maker M1 and the Shredder R1, a paired desktop system that lets users shred 3D printing waste and extrude it back into usable filament on... Anyone who has spent serious time around a 3D printer knows the guilt that comes with it, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 01, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/image2-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/from-scrap-to-spool-crealitys-m1-and-r1-bring-filament-recycling-to-the-desktop-250487

♻️ Stop Trashing Your Failed Prints: Creality’s Filament Maker M1 and Shredder R1 Are Live - All3DP Stop Trashing Your Failed Prints: Creality’s Filament Maker M1 and Shredder R1 Are Live All3DP Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Apr 01, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxQTlpJVzljZEttb2hfSXRKN2d6d19reUVOM0xkWUR1LVZxWjRha1VIWnUyLXhKMUpmc0p0dnR1RVVlS0ZicUt0YVJLdTM5TmhoMzJHUHN5d3huQ1hDUW56YlRzRU9zZGFwak11X1BXWEpGVjFrd3YwMHhIS1d5TzJmakt0aEhiMHFGQmEyYll3VEFOQWk4MHJUTkxMWklfYlV3WDRHdkpPX2Q1a3c?oc=5

🦺 Georgetown researcher develops natural 3D printed bone grafts A Georgetown University researcher is developing 3D printed bone grafts made from natural materials that could reduce the complications associated with conventional metal and synthetic implants. It’s an issue that … The post Georgetown researcher develops natural 3D printed bone grafts appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Georgetown-bone-grafts-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/georgetown-researcher-develops-natural-3d-printed-bone-grafts

🚀 America Makes launches two project calls totaling $14.5m America Makes and the National Center for Defense Manufacturing and Machining (NCDMM) have launched two project calls worth a combined $14.5 million in funding, both backed by the Office of … The post America Makes... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 01, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/America-Makes-facility-face-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/america-makes-launches-two-project-calls-totaling-14-5m

🚀 Eurobearings deploys Meltio Engine Robot Integration to support marine, defence & energy customers Eurobearings has paired the capability with a KUKA industrial robot at its Italian production facility. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 01, 2026. Image ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/content/images/2026/04/Eurobearings-12.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/eurobearings-deploys-meltio-engine-robot-integration-to-support-marine-defence-energy-customers

💻 Argonne’s ASME Submission Aims to Open a Formal Pathway for LPBF in Nuclear Reactor Manufacturing Argonne National Laboratory, a research center operated by UChicago Argonne, for the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE), has submitted the first draft of an ASME Code Case proposing Laser Powder Bed Fusion as a permitted manufacturing process for high-temperature nuclear reactor components, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 01, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/AMMT-image-2-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/argonnes-asme-submission-aims-to-open-a-formal-pathway-for-lpbf-in-nuclear-reactor-manufacturing-250479

📰 Ceramic AM applications (and services) take the spotlight at Ceramitec 2026 With 2025 revenues of $187 million and projected 2030 revenues of $635 million, the ceramic AM market is maturing into a solid business opportunity. For this to happen, a complex … The post Ceramic AM applications (and services) take the spotlight at Ceramitec 2026 appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Ceramitec_2026_IMG_2533-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ceramic-am-applications-and-services-take-the-spotlight-at-ceramitec-2026

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #84 - 2026-04-01
item.description:
🔥 Bambu Lab and Pop Mart Lawsuit Settled Out of Court Chinese 3D printer manufacturer Bambu Lab has reached a settlement with toymaker Pop Mart over copyright infringement claims tied to unauthorised Labubu character files uploaded to its file-sharing platform, MakerWorld. The deal was struck ahead of what would have been a closely watched trial scheduled for April 2, 2026, at the People’s Court of Pudong […], reported by 3D Printing Industry on Mar 31, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Screenshot-printables-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/bambu-lab-and-pop-mart-lawsuit-settled-out-of-court-250455

🔥 In 3D printing debate, Republicans apply Bruen, Founding documents in failed plea to kill bill - canoncitydailyrecord.com In 3D printing debate, Republicans apply Bruen, Founding documents in failed plea to kill bill canoncitydailyrecord.com Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Mar 31, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🔥 Colorado lawmakers pass bill to ban 3D printing of guns after veto threat forces amendments - The Daily Gazette Colorado lawmakers pass bill to ban 3D printing of guns after veto threat forces amendments The Daily Gazette Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Mar 30, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🦺 Polysaccharide microneedles and 3D printing explored for cancer immunotherapy applications Researchers have reviewed the use of polysaccharide-based microneedles (PMNs) for cancer immunotherapy, examining how additive manufacturing methods, including 3D printing, can support the development of transdermal... The study, published in Glycoscience & Therapy, focuses on the role of natural polymer materials in enabling minimally invasive treatment approaches that combine drug delivery with […], reported by 3D Printing Industry on Mar 31, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/image-17-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/polysaccharide-microneedles-and-3d-printing-explored-for-cancer-immunotherapy-applications-250399

💻 Materialise to spin off RapidFit business in management-led transfer Materialise, the Belgian AM software and service provider that trades on the NASDAQ, is transferring its RapidFit business to the unit’s existing management team, with the transaction expected to close … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on Mar 31, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Materialise-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/materialise-to-spin-off-rapidfit-business-in-management-led-transfer

🏠 3D printing unlocks innovation for McGill’s Formula Electric team Every year, student teams from around the world put their efforts towards building the fastest electric race cars and test their designs at the Formula SAE Electric competition. The tradition, … The post 3D printing unlocks innovation for McGill’s Formula Electric team appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/mcgill-formula-electric-1-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/3d-printing-unlocks-innovation-for-mcgills-formula-electric-team

🚀 Astrobase Space Technologies receives India’s largest 3D printer for FFSC rocket engine production Astrobase Space Technologies, a space travel startup in India, has received what it claims is the country’s largest 3D printer at its Bengaluru facility. Requiring four trucks to transport it, … The post Astrobase Space Technologies receives India’s largest 3D printer for FFSC rocket engine production appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Astrobase-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/astrobase-space-technologies-receives-indias-largest-3d-printer-for-ffsc-rocket-engine-production

🚀 Optris launches new CTi pyrometer models The new solutions are said to be designed for demanding industrial environments and utilise infrared sensors to provide highly accurate non-contact temperature measurement for metals and high-temperature applications. Reported by TCT Magazine on Mar 31, 2026. Image ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/content/images/2026/03/OPTCTi_side6_2.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/optris-launches-new-cti-pyrometer-models

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #83 - 2026-03-31
item.description:

💻 UK blockchain platform addresses IP protection in additive manufacturing A blockchain-based platform designed to protect intellectual property in additive manufacturing has been validated by the UK’s National Composites Centre (NCC). The validation paves the way toward a broader adoption … The post UK blockchain platform addresses IP protection in additive manufacturing appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Autentica-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/uk-blockchain-platform-addresses-ip-protection-in-additive-manufacturing

📰 Stratasys to support qualifcation & deployment of 3D printed parts across military platforms via US DOW contract "Stratasys Direct already ships over 100,000 parts annually to the defence industry, and programs like JAMA will accelerate the qualification of parts so organisations can deploy them faster across operational... Reported by TCT Magazine on Mar 30, 2026. Image ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/content/images/2026/03/Airbus_A400M-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/stratasys-to-support-qualifcation-deployment-of-3d-printed-parts-across-military-platforms-via-us-dow-contract

🏠 Velo3D secures $9.8m Department of War contract to support additive manufacture of spare & replacement parts A 'flexible acquisition pathway' that enables the Defense Logistics Agency to procure qualified additively manufactured components will be established. Reported by TCT Magazine on Mar 30, 2026. Image ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/content/images/2026/03/Velo-3D-Sapphire-C_Original-1024x683-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/velo3d-secures-9-8m-department-of-war-contract-to-support-additive-manufacture-of-spare-replacement-parts

🚀 Post-processing specialist Spengler launches SLS 3D printing service French company Spengler, which specializes in post-processing systems for powder bed fusion, has expanded into the services realm, launching an in-house selective laser sintering (SLS) production line. In offering this … The post Post-processing specialist Spengler launches SLS 3D printing service appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/spengler-service-2-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/post-processing-specialist-spengler-launches-sls-3d-printing-service

🚀 74 Seconds: an engineer aims to break the 3D printing speed ​​barrier Jan Roetz, an independent engineer and YouTube creator, has just set a new record in 3D printing. His self-built printer, with a name that is anything but accidental, printed a … The post 74 Seconds: an engineer aims to break the 3D printing speed ​​barrier appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Zrzut-ekranu-2026-03-29-220849-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/74-seconds-an-engineer-aims-to-break-the-3d-printing-speed-barrier

💻 Autodesk adds Wonder 3D generative model to Flow Studio Autodesk, a leading provider of design software, has added Wonder 3D to its Flow Studio platform, bringing to market a generative model for producing three-dimensional assets from text prompts or … The post Autodesk... Reported by VoxelMatters on Mar 30, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/AutoDesk-Wonder3D-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/autodesk-adds-wonder-3d-generative-model-to-flow-studio

Reported by VoxelMatters on Mar 29, 2026. Reported by VoxelMatters on Mar 29, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Fraunhofer-develops-multi-metal-3D-printing-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/fraunhofer-develops-multi-metal-3d-printing-process-for-rocket-components

A new director, James Gunn, who came over from Marvel after the success of his Guardians of the Galaxy trilogy,, reported by 3DPrint.com on Mar 29, 2026. Reported by VoxelMatters on Mar 28, 2026. The service enables companies to convert … The post Sculpteo launches 3D scanning service for European clients appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Facade-Sculpteo-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/sculpteo-launches-3d-scanning-service-for-european-clients

Reported by VoxelMatters on Mar 28, 2026. Reported by VoxelMatters on Mar 28, 2026. 🖨 Legacy Effects Used 3D Printing to Enhance Effects on Superman 2025 Legacy Effects, US visual effects studio, transformed how physical production assets are built during the making of Superman 2025 by integrating Bambu Lab‘s X1C 3D printing systems mid-production into nearly every... The result was a faster iteration, lighter stunt suits, and camera-ready parts that once required slower, costlier processes, all […], reported by 3D Printing Industry on Mar 28, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Bambu-Lab-Legacy-Effects-13-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/legacy-effects-used-3d-printing-to-enhance-effects-on-superman-2025-250357

🖨 Scrap Labs debuts Scrap 1 LPBF metal 3D printer at $9,600 entry-level price Scrap Labs will debut its first product, the Scrap 1 laser powder bed fusion metal 3D printer, at the Rocky Mountain RepRap Festival (RMRRF) in Loveland, Colorado, on April 18–19, … The post Scrap Labs debuts Scrap 1... Reported by VoxelMatters on Mar 27, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/nanobanana-cube-hero-cropped-e1774545707483-150x150.webp Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/scrap-labs-debuts-scrap-1-lpbf-metal-3d-printer-at-9600-entry-level-price

The JAMA initiative represents a deliberate effort by the US Department of Defense (DoD) to modernize […], reported by 3D Printing Industry on Mar 27, 2026. item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #80 - 2026-03-28
item.description:
🔥 Democrats abandon effort to ban distribution of 3D gun instructions to avoid Jared Polis veto - The Colorado Sun Democrats abandon effort to ban distribution of 3D gun instructions to avoid Jared Polis veto The Colorado Sun Reported by Google News - 3D Printing Viral on Mar 27, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiiAFBVV95cUxQQTlraU0wdmt3VGJ0UWNEaVRFeVZWMDd5bDJveXNJaWRic09TcVBlZEVtMXQyd0NfQzdCRjBBYzhGeGlmVFNRd01CQ1o0WE5sejh3ZUpaX3lvZkJ3MDhlMmpmQkZ6OEkybWFMbTlybVcyNnVYLWNydk1Pd3pwME9DbEp3elJ0dm9k?oc=5

🔥 Hochul pushing to ban 3D printed guns, gun parts - TheDailyNewsOnline.com Hochul pushing to ban 3D printed guns, gun parts TheDailyNewsOnline.com Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Mar 27, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🚀 Rapid Fusion targets €1M Italian expansion through exclusive Aivox partnership Rapid Fusion, an Exeter-based large-format additive manufacturing company, is targeting a €1 million expansion after signing an exclusive agreement with Aivox, an Italian engineering and innovation consultancy, to... The deal focuses on customers in architecture, fashion, medtech, and Northern Italy’s naval sector, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Mar 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Aivox_Lab-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/rapid-fusion-targets-e1m-italian-expansion-through-exclusive-aivox-partnership-250270
